title: PVP-005: 500 Animation Quality Defect Audit
method: vision_analyze on 16+ game_loop frames (8 combat + 8 walk-cycle ticks)
status: Animation pipeline PROVEN WORKING — quality audit of working animation

defects.defect: Walk cycle starts from bind-pose-like arms — no natural entry transition

Left character arm stays extended sideways at tick 1 instead of swinging forward
Right character arm stays extended sideways at tick 1 instead of swinging backward
No visible arm swing at any tick from 1 through 8
